title: UrlLogPayload
description: Schema for a forwarded PAN-OS URL filtering log entry. URL logs capture web access events evaluated by the URL Filtering security profile, providing visibility into browsing activity, policy enforcement, and URL category decisions.

receive_time.description: Timestamp when the URL log entry was received by Strata Logging Service.

serial.description: Serial number of the Palo Alto Networks device that generated this URL log entry.

type.description: Log type identifier, always URL for URL filtering log entries.

src.description: Source IP address of the client making the web request.

dst.description: Destination IP address of the web server being accessed.

sport.description: Source port number of the HTTP/HTTPS session.

dport.description: Destination port number of the HTTP/HTTPS session.

app.description: Application identified by App-ID for the web session (e.g., web-browsing, ssl, google-base).

url.description: The full URL that was requested, including protocol, hostname, path, and query parameters if present.

url_category.description: URL category classification assigned by PAN-DB URL filtering database (e.g., business-and-economy, malware, social-networking, command-and-control).

action.description: Action applied to the URL request by the URL Filtering security profile configured on the matching security policy rule.

http_method.description: HTTP method of the web request.

content_type.description: MIME content type of the HTTP response.

src_user.description: Source user identity associated with the web request if User-ID is enabled.

rule_name.description: Name of the security policy rule that matched the session containing this URL request.

device_name.description: Hostname of the firewall that generated this URL log entry.

vsys.description: Virtual system name or identifier on the firewall.

log_forwarding_profile.description: Name of the log forwarding profile that forwarded this log entry.

output_format.description: Output format in which this log entry was forwarded.
